zh.lifeSummary: John Shelley是John Shelley和Margaret Eastgate的兒子，於1451年出生在英國素可可拉法姆。他於1474年與Elizabeth Michelgrove在英國素可可拉法姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1527年1月3日在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國素可可拉法姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Shelley是John Shelley和Margaret Eastgate的儿子，于1451年出生在英国素可可拉法姆。他于1474年与Elizabeth Michelgrove在英国素可可拉法姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1527年1月3日在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在英国素可可拉法姆。

nameMeanings.name: Shelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

variants.name: Shallow
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny and Wexford): variant of   Shelley  .
English: nickname from Middle English shalou(e) ‘shallow’, conjectured also to mean ‘thin’; perhaps also the same word in the topographic sense of ‘shallow place in a stretch of water’.

variants.name: Shelly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Sheley
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Shelley  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: John Shelley was born in 1451, in Clapham, Sussex, England as the son of John Shelley and Margaret Eastgate. He married Elizabeth Michelgrove in 1474, in Clapham, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 3 January 1527, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Clapham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Shelley est né en 1451, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, fils de John Shelley et Margaret Eastgate. Il a épousé Elizabeth Michelgrove en 1474, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 3 janvier 1527, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Shelley wurde 1451 in Clapham, Sussex, England, als Sohn von John Shelley und Margaret Eastgate geboren. Er hat 1474 in Clapham, Sussex, England Elizabeth Michelgrove geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Januar 1527 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Clapham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Shelley è nato il nel 1451 nel Clapham, Sussex, England come figlio di John Shelley e Margaret Eastgate. Lui sposato Elizabeth Michelgrove nel 1474, nel Clapham, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 3 gennaio 1527, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Clapham, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Shelleyは1451年にイギリススセックスクラファムでJohn ShelleyとMargaret Eastgateの息子として生まれた。1474年にイギリススセックスクラファムでElizabeth Michelgroveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1527年1月3日に故郷で76歳で死去し，イギリススセックスクラファムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Shelley(은)는 1451년 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 John Shelley(와)과 Margaret Eastgate의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1474년 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 Elizabeth Michelgrove(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1527년 1월 3일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 클라프아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Shelley nasceu em 1451, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra filho de John Shelley e Margaret Eastgate. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Michelgrove em 1474, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1527, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Shelley родился в 1451 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия. Его родителей звали John Shelley и Margaret Eastgate. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Michelgrove в 1474 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 3 января 1527 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Shelley nació en 1451, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra como hijo de John Shelley y Margaret Eastgate. Se casó con Elizabeth Michelgrove en 1474, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 3 de enero de 1527, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
